sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_seq (id bigint, value bigint);
INSERT INTO test_seq (id, value) VALUES (1, next_value_for('dwh2', 'seq_9201'));
INSERT INTO test_seq (id, value) VALUES (2, next_value_for('dwh2', 'seq_9201'));
UPDATE test_seq SET value = next_value_for('dwh2', 'seq_9201') WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, value FROM test_seq WHERE value > 0;
